  "title": "MTN FiberHome Sales Engineer",
  "description": "ZTE Corporation is a global leader in telecommunications and information technology. Founded in 1985 and listed on both the Hong Kong and Shenzhen Stock Exchanges, the company has been committed to providing innovative technologies and integrated solutions for global operators, government and enterprises, and consumers from over 160 countries across the globe. Serving over 1/4 of the global population, the company is dedicated to enabling connectivity and trust everywhere for a better future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;MTN FiberHome Sales Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)

Responsibilities


	Support Fiber Home sales by providing technical expertise and product knowledge.
	Understand customer requirements and propose suitable MTN fiber solutions.
	Assist in preparing proposals, presentations, and quotations.
	Collaborate with sales and technical teams to ensure smooth service delivery.
	Provide technical support during customer meetings and site visits.


Requirements


	Minimum 2 years of sales or technical experience in telecom, fiber broadband, or related industries.
	Strong understanding of MTN or ZTE products and systems is an advantage.
	Ability to translate technical information for customers.
	Good communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Valid driver&rsquo;s license and willingness to travel.

MTN FiberHome Sales Engineer Job at ZTE Corporation




        
    

        
        ZTE Corporation is a global leader in telecommunications and information technology. Founded in 1985 and listed on both the Hong Kong and Shenzhen Stock Exchanges, the company has been committed to providing innovative technologies and integrated solutions for global operators, government and enterprises, and consumers from over 160 countries across the globe. Serving over 1/4 of the global population, the company is dedicated to enabling connectivity and trust everywhere for a better future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: MTN FiberHome Sales Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Support Fiber Home sales by providing technical expertise and product knowledge.
	Understand customer requirements and propose suitable MTN fiber solutions.
	Assist in preparing proposals, presentations, and quotations.
	Collaborate with sales and technical teams to ensure smooth service delivery.
	Provide technical support during customer meetings and site visits.


Requirements


	Minimum 2 years of sales or technical experience in telecom, fiber broadband, or related industries.
	Strong understanding of MTN or ZTE products and systems is an advantage.
	Ability to translate technical information for customers.
	Good communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Valid driver’s license and willingness to travel.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
